scripts.dev: npx kill-port 5000 3000 && npx concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "cyan.bold,magenta.bold,yellow.bold" --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND,TUNNEL" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "cloudflared tunnel run"
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev:tunnel: cloudflared tunnel run & sleep 5 && npm run dev
